---
title: "防跌倒扶手问卷数据描述性统计分析"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r}
#| echo=FALSE
library(tidyverse)
library(labelled)
data_path <- "D:/RDirectory/zhengdabei/data/子女_老年人.RData"
```

```{r}
#| echo=FALSE
load(data_path)
```

```{r}
# 2. 清洗标签变量并转为数值
df_C_clean <- df_C %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ remove_labels(.x))) %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      everything(),
      ~ if (inherits(.x, "haven_labelled")) {
        as.numeric(haven::as_factor(.x, levels = "values"))
      } else {
        .x
      }
    )
  )

# 3. 提取数值变量并分组统计
df_C_num <- df_C_clean %>%
  select(
    居住行政区_1_6_C,
    where(is.numeric) & -c(序号_C, 问卷总分_C, 答题时长_C)
  ) %>%
  drop_na(居住行政区_1_6_C)

# 4. 分组统计均值+标准差+中位数+样本量
desc_by_district <- df_C_num %>%
  group_by(居住行政区_1_6_C) %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      everything(),
      list(
        均值 = ~ round(mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
        标准差 = ~ round(sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
        中位数 = ~ median(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
        样本量 = ~ sum(!is.na(.x))
      ),
      .names = "{.col}_{.fn}"
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    居住行政区 = case_when(
      居住行政区_1_6_C == 1 ~ "和平区",
      居住行政区_1_6_C == 2 ~ "南开区",
      居住行政区_1_6_C == 3 ~ "河北区",
      居住行政区_1_6_C == 4 ~ "河东区",
      居住行政区_1_6_C == 5 ~ "河西区",
      居住行政区_1_6_C == 6 ~ "红桥区",
      TRUE ~ "未知"
    )
  ) %>%
  relocate(居住行政区, .before = 居住行政区_1_6_C)

```
